final:
// // This module implements a D flip-flop that updates the output q to the value of input d on the falling edge of the clock signal clk, regardless of the state of the clock enable input clk_en.
module top_module(
	input clk,    
	input clk_en, 
	input d,  
	output reg q 
	
);always @(posedge clk ) begin 
		if(clk_en) begin
			q <= d;
		end
	end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a D flip-flop that updates the output q to the value of input d on the falling edge of the clock signal clk, regardless of the state of the clock enable input clk_en.
